selected_markets.title: Will the **high temp in Denver** be <54° on Feb 14, 2026?

valuations.rationale: February 14 in Denver historically averages high temps around 45-47°F. A high <54°F is common but not guaranteed. Mid-prob of 0.025 appears slightly underpriced given historical frequency of sub-54° days in mid-February. Enrich_bias of 0.0384 suggests modest upward adjustment. Set fair_prob slightly above mid_prob to account for seasonal baseline, but maintain low confidence due to weather volatility and specific date uncertainty.
